summary.intent: Review and resolve open comment threads on GitHub PR #479 in the moltis repository, addressing feedback about CI/scripting safety and Docker caching.
summary.outcome: Resolved review threads by fixing NodeSource curl/pipefail handling, adding a named Docker volume for npx cache persistence, and updating docs/src/mcp.md based on new comments.

repo: PR reviews are tracked on github.com/moltis-org/moltis

code.finding: MCP containerized example required a named Docker volume (moltis-npx-cache) to persist npm packages across container restarts

workflow: NodeSource setup scripts should be downloaded to a temp file before piping to bash so curl failures propagate non-zero exit codes instead of silently falling through
PR review threads are fetched via GitHub API/gh CLI before resolving to catch new comments
